text_anchor: I cannot submit my inquiry because the modal is blocked by elements behind it.
positive_node: <div className="modal-overlay fixed inset-0 z-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm px-4">

text_anchor: Navigation and branding become hidden when scrolling through the art gallery.
positive_node: <header className="py-12 px-6 md:px-12 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-8 sticky top-0 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md z-0">

text_anchor: Navigation between Current, Upcoming and Past tabs is confusing because they are stacked vertically.
The layout is not taking full advantage of space and feels cramped.
Visitors cannot easily see the exhibition name because the text is tiny.
positive_node: <h2 className="serif text-sm md:text-sm lg:text-sm mb-4 leading-tight">

text_anchor: I can hardly read the names of the artworks displayed in the gallery.
positive_node: <h3 className="serif text-2xl text-gray-300 group-hover:italic transition-all duration-500">

text_anchor: It's difficult to interact with the form fields because there's no space around them.
positive_node: <div className="modal-container bg-white border border-gray-100 w-full max-w-xl p-0 md:p-0 relative shadow-2xl animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-300">

text_anchor: The layout feels cramped and the social media section runs together with the name.
I cannot click the Inquire button when I want to because it fades away.
positive_node: <div className="pt-4 flex items-center justify-between opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-500">

text_anchor: I don't know which exhibition category I'm currently viewing because the indicator is missing.
positive_node: <span className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-px bg-black opacity-0 animate-[scale-x_0.3s_ease-out]" />
